title: RC-2 daemon ownership re-election (foundation)
description: Flag-gated, default-off foundation for the complete RC-2 fix (daemon outlives its owner). Root cause: shutdownLauncherForSignal explicitly child.kill(signal)s the daemon, so it dies with the owner. When SPECKIT_DAEMON_REELECTION is on, the owner spawns the context-server detached (+unref) and, on shutdown, RELEASES it (reap only the model-server, keep the daemon lease/socket, drop only the owner lease, detach the exit handler so it doesn't wipe the daemon lease, exit without killing the daemon) for a live secondary to bridge to. Default off is byte-identical to phase 017 (spawn-io identity is unit-asserted). A gpt-5.5-fast HIGH adversarial diff review caught a blocking exit-handler lease-wipe bug, now fixed. Secondary OWNERSHIP adoption + the released daemon's terminal idle-death are runtime-validation-gated before enabling the flag; the phase-021 orphan sweeper bounds any released-daemon leak. Fifth and final deferred daemon-reliability hardening item from phase 017.
